title: Cyberpunk Character Portrait
summary: Hyper-detailed character portrait - holographic visor, neon facial paint, chrome augments.
prompt: An ultra-detailed cyberpunk character portrait: a young person in dramatic three-quarter profile wearing a holographic translucent visor reflecting magenta and cyan, neon UV facial paint streaks, chrome cybernetic temple augments, an undercut hairstyle in electric teal. Backlit by a rainy Tokyo neon sign. Cinematic film-still composition, 85mm portrait lens, noir science-fiction cyberpunk aesthetic. Hyper-realistic skin and material detail.
